title: Nimura
description: Minecraft with a hint of spice. Not too much to ruin the vanilla experience, but just enough to make things interesting.
body:
![nimura_header](https://i.imgur.com/7hoWWhS.png)

# Something new.. but also familiar?

Nimura is a modpack specifically crafted for those who want something new to explore, but stay connected to the base game. this modpack is nothing "too much" or "too little", but it's something "just right" and doesn't need too much content. Nimura changes what's in the base game (terrain, villages, dungeons) and makes it all different to make things exciting and new, but also familiar! 

## Important Notes:
- It is recommended to dedicate 8GB of RAM for this modpack. (Singleplayer and Multiplayer).
- You must run this modpack using Java 17.

![nimura_header_1](https://i.imgur.com/rVxuqUA.png)
